explanations.2: Final is a type hint that means this value cannot be changed after it's set — it's a constant.
explanations.9: These underscores at the start signal that these are private constants meant only for use inside this class.
explanations.33: splitlines() breaks the entire file content into a list of individual lines, removing the line break characters.
explanations.39: The second argument (1) tells index() to start searching from position 1, skipping the first delimiter we already found.
explanations.41: This catches the case where there's an opening --- but no closing ---, so we give up and insert at the top instead.
explanations.52: This creates a multi-line string by chaining strings together with the f before each part.
explanations.59: insert() adds the formatted TLDR at the specific position in the list without replacing what's already there.
explanations.60: join() takes all the list items and glues them back together into one string, using a newline between each line.
